sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10191" key="a)ntimi/sion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀντιμίσιον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, <sense id="n10191.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">(mensa) table in a court of justice,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
